summary: Adjusted the opening time markers so the missed-work stretch now tracks cleanly from Chapter 3's July 13 ending into the Monday office return. Left the chapter exit intact because its Eastbridge pressure already hands off cleanly into Chapter 5's later domestic routine.
edits: Changed the opening absence span from 'the first five workdays' to 'the rest of that week and all of the next one' so the chapter entry matches the prior boundary date.
Specified 'the second Thursday' so Ray's impatience escalates on a coherent timeline before Nate returns on Monday.
